aliases.name: Aliases
aliases.description:
A comma separated <cg>list of aliases</c> to watch for in the comments

Writing an <cy>*@*</c> at the beginning of an alias will make it so you'll only get notified if someone writes a <cl>literal *'@'*</c> at the beginning of the mention

use-custom-ids.name: Track Custom Levels
use-custom-ids.description: Track mentions on any level of your choice

custom-ids.name: Custom Levels
custom-ids.description: A comma separated <cg>list of level IDs</c> that will be checked for

refresh-rate.name: Refresh Rate
refresh-rate.description:
The rate in which the mod will request the GD servers (in seconds).

<cr>A low enough refresh rate may cause you to get rate limited, be careful!</c>

ignore-self.name: Ignore Self Mentions
ignore-self.description: Ignore mentions when you're the one that mentioned yourself

show-errors.name: Show Error Notifications
show-errors.description:
In the case a <cr>request fails</c> or any other <co>error</c> occurs, a <cl>notification</c> will appear notifying the error

Useful for catching errors but can be annoying
